title: cyclocampe aubertii
intro: Cyclocampe aubertii, also known as the silver fern or cyclocampine, is a type of flowering plant in the family Asparagaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of cyclocampe aubertii include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and possess antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, or by using the plant's extracts in capsule or tincture form.
